name: update_draft
description:
Update an existing Gmail draft with new content. Replaces the draft's recipients, subject, and body.

Use this tool when the user wants to modify a draft they previously created.
The draft_id should come from gmail_create_draft or gmail_list_drafts.

Note: This completely replaces the draft content. Provide all fields, not just the changed ones.

draft_id.description: The draft ID to update (from gmail_create_draft or gmail_list_drafts)

to.description: Updated list of recipient email addresses (To field)

body.description: Updated plain text body of the email
